scenario: Log-aggregation processor. PII in scope under DPA (log contents). Type II + ISO current. DPA 2021 SCCs.

documents.soc2:
SOC 2 Type II Report — QuantumLog
Audit period: 2024-01 to 2024-12
Trust Services Criteria: Security, Availability, Confidentiality
Opinion: Unqualified. No exceptions noted.
Auditor: Independent CPA firm.
documents.iso27001:
ISO/IEC 27001 Certificate — QuantumLog
Valid through: 2027-06-01
Scope: Information security management for production services.
documents.dpa:
Data Processing Agreement — QuantumLog
Governing SCC module: 2021 (Module 2: Controller → Processor)
Subject matter: provision of contracted services.
Subprocessor approval: prior written approval required (Art. 28(2)).

Subprocessor list:
  - AWS Inc.

documents.questionnaire:
Security Questionnaire (SIG Lite) — QuantumLog
Encryption: Encryption in transit (TLS 1.3) and at rest (AES-256).
MFA: Required for all customer-facing access.
Breach notification: 72 hours.
documents.package_summary: Vendor package summary: DPA-bound processor; PII in scope.
